problem: The repository had no explicit governed seam spanning triage handoff acceptance, booking truth projection, patient-safe notification generation, and booking-shell deep-link re-entry.
closure: Task 306 adds BookingTriageNotificationIntegrationContract, route definitions, seeded state coverage, and validator-backed browser proofs across the shared patient and staff shells.
remainingRisk: Patient and staff browser proofs still lean on seeded scenario aliases until both shells bind directly to the integrated status query surface.
